name: wiki.update_page
description: Update an existing wiki page. Can append to or replace the body, and/or update frontmatter fields. Returns lint warnings for the domain after the update.

body_additions.description: Text to append to the page body (or replace if replace_body is true)

frontmatter_updates.description: Frontmatter fields to update (merged with existing)

replace_body.description: If true, replace body entirely instead of appending (default: false)
